title: Second Page of Products
description: Get the second page of products (items 11-20) when sorted alphabetically by name, with 10 items per page.
concept: Chain .skip(n) to skip the first n documents. Combined with .limit(), this enables pagination. For page 2 with 10 items per page, skip 10 and limit 10.
hint: Sort by name, skip 10, limit 10: db.products.find().sort({name: 1}).skip(10).limit(10)
